name: Tuscany Peasant Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Fresh basil, chopped or 1/2 teaspoon dried
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice sausages into half-inch thick slices.
2. In a large saucepan, brown the sausages. If using turkey sausage, spray the pan with vegetable oil first.
3. Drain any excess fat from the pan.
4. Add diced celery, zucchini, and onion to the pan. Stir for 2 minutes.
5. Pour in beef stock, tomato sauce, and basil (fresh or dried). Mix well.
6. Heat on high (300°F) for 30 minutes.
7. Add the sausage-vegetable mixture into the crockery pot.
8. Turn to low heat and cook for an additional 2-3 hours, seasoning with salt and pepper as desired.
9. Serve hot in bowls, garnished with grated cheese. Accompany with garlic-buttered toasted French bread.
10. Note: Turkey-based Italian sausages can be used for a lower-fat version of this soup.
